title: as it has active exec sessions: container state improper
body:
现在容器不能删掉 rm -f 也不行 报as it has active exec sessions: container state improper错误

container use (rm -f) cannot delete. output error as it has active exec sessions: container state improper

Version:            1.4.4
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.10.3
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I don't believe this is a bug in the master branch.  Podman1.4.4 is a very old release.  On RHEL and Centos the current suported release is podman 1.6.4 please upgrade and see if the issue is fixed.
